Fits: Any size Acoustic Guitar.(Not For Electric Guitar).", 'Product Features:', 'Guitar strings service life depends on the products quality and the players habits . High E is the most vulnerable of six strings. Now you need not to run to the guitar store or pay for a whole set.  Enough quantity for those players who always break thier High E string. Nickel-Coating for those playes who always own sweat hand. Individually wrapped never worried about the package opened but not used strings will face the oxidation. The rest can be stored 5 years at least.', 'Valuable Product!', 'Small Tips:', 'New strings are not fully stretched, they will out of tune in playing, which is normal phenomenon. The quickest way is let them bear proper tension. For example, do this action: Bends, Release, Repeat this action several times. This allows it to be fully stretched in few minutes. After our sturdy testing, these unstretched strings have 7% chance to be broken if do that, Why? Are these terrible strings? Of course not. Unstretched strings means the force on each part of the string body is not uniform, too rude actions may cause them break, This problem happend on any brand strings. Control your strength when doing this action. Once it fully stretched, a sturdy string will be given.', 'Package Contents:', 'Acoustic Strings x 10.']
['Vencetmat acoustic strings offer bright and well-balanced sound.', 'Rust-prevent coating and each string was Individually wrapped, that means the installed one has excellent oxidation-prevent and the rest can be stored for 5 years at least.', 'Custom light gauges(.011), easy to play and hard to break, the most popular gauges for guitar players. whatever you are beginner or professional guitarist, This gauge fit for you perfectly.', 'Enough quantity at an amazing price, never again buy a whole set just for your high E string replacing. Save your buck.', 'For guitar players, these strings are perfect backup and emergency supplies.']

Cardinal Thomas and Friends Pop Up Game
['Product Description', 'The Toysmith Thomas and Friends Pop Up Game offers hours of fun for train lovers of all ages. Based on the popular Thomas the Tank Engine franchise, the object of this game is to be the first player to get all his pieces back home. The rules of the game are simple and easy to learn. Just pop the dice bubble and move the markers along the board. The sealed dice bubble keeps young players from separating the dice from the game. Suitable for two to four players. Recommended for ages 4 years and up.', 'From the Manufacturer', 'Thomas and Friends Pop Up Game from Toysmith is perfect for 2-4 players. Push the bubble to roll the dice and race for the station. Be the first to get your pieces into the station. Easy to play and you will never lose your dice. Ages 4 and up.']

Magic The Gathering Commander Masters Set Booster Box - 24 Packs (360 Magic Cards)
["Roll out the red carpet for your Commander! Enhance your multiplayer decks with some of the greatest cards to ever grace the Commander format. We’ve also got some surprises in store, with some packs containing special treatment cards destined for starring roles in your collection. This Commander Masters Set Booster Box contains 24 Commander Masters Set Boosters. Each Set Booster contains 15 Magic cards, 1 Art Card, and 1 token/ad card or card from “The List” (a special card from Magic's history—found in 25% of packs), including 2–6 cards of rarity Rare or higher (2: 34%; 3: 48%; 4: 15%; 5: 2%; 6: <1%) and 3–8 Uncommon, 4–8 Common, and 1 Land cards. Every pack contains at least 1 Traditional Foil card of any rarity. A Traditional Foil Land replaces the basic land in 20% of Set Boosters and a Foil-Stamped Signature Art Card replaces the Art Card in 10% of Set Boosters. A Traditional Foil Borderless Mythic Rare card can be found in 1% of boosters."]
['FIRST  SET FOR —Masters boosters are super-charged packs full of the finest Magic: The Gathering reprints; Commander Masters brings the first Masters packs specifically designed for Commander, Magic’s most popular format', 'BEST  TO OPEN JUST FOR FUN—designed for a fun pack-opening experience, if you want to explore the set by opening packs just to see what you get, Set Boosters are for you', ' RARES AND FOIL IN EVERY PACK—in every pack you’ll get 2–6 cards of rarity Rare or higher, at least 1 Traditional Foil card, and 1 Art Card showcasing a piece of art from the set', ' CARD IN EVERY PACK—every Set Booster contains 1–4 Borderless cards, with at least 1 Borderless Common or Uncommon card', '2  CARDS IN EVERY PACK—each booster also contains at least 2 Legendary cards, including 1 Rare or Mythic Rare', '—24 Commander Masters Set Boosters, each containing 15 MTG cards']

Team Yankee: United States: LAV Platoon
['World War III Team Yankee: American LAV Platoon The Light Armoured Vehicle, or LAV, is one of the newest vehicles in the Marine Corps’ arsenal. Based on the Swiss MOWAG Piranha and built by General Motors in Canada, this vehicle offers the Marines a fast, highly mobile reconnaissance and light fire support vehicle. Introduced in 1983, the Marine Corps have organised a number of light armoured vehicle battalions equipped with the LAV and assigned to the Marine divisions. Each battalion has four light armoured vehicle companies equipped with LAV-25, LAV-AT and LAV-M vehicles. The standard LAV-25 found in the light armoured vehicle platoons mounts a turret armed with an M242 25mm chain gun that can fire anti-tank and high explosive rounds. A coaxial M240 machine-gun is mounted alongside the chain-gun, and a pintle-mounted M240 machine-gun is mounted on the turret roof. Package Contents: - 5 x plastic LAV-25 vehicles - 2 x plastic AT upgrade sprues - 1 x tank commander sprue - 1 x mortar crew sprue - 5 x unit cards Package Info: - Product is for use in the Team Yankee / Flames of War: WWIII miniature table top game. - Models may require assembly. - Any scenery, paint, or glue shown is sold separately. ["Experience the fun and excitement of teamwork with Upbounders Picnic Panic cooperative board game for kids! Our cooperative board game is designed for 2 to 4 players and is suitable for children aged 4 and up. This classic kids game makes for a great birthday gift for preschool boys and girls. It's the perfect addition to any child's game collection, and a great way to bond with children and spend quality family time together! Encourage your child to challenge their mind and expand their cognitive skills and hand-eye coordination. Eco-friendly and printed with nontoxic inks. Each unique game’s design uses bright and playful original artwork to represent diversity, fun, and love, making them excellent classroom supplies for preschool and kindergarten teachers. Our first board games for kids 4-6 are designed to teach in a visual-spatial manner, specifically catering to hands-on learners and providing children from an early age a clear picture of what families are like and how each one is different in its own unique way."]

['Roosebeck Pixie Harp 19-String Chelby Levers. Featuring the smooth, sleek look of the Chelby levers is reflected in their functionality. Compared to the standard Roosebeck harp levers, the Chelby levers are mechanically superior. The design allows the lever to engage the string from the side and limit the possibility of strings lifting off the bridge pin. The red and blue colored caps allow you to quickly locate the C- and F-string levers. The lever is attached to its base by a hex bolt. A synthetic washer is spaced between the lever and base, creating a smooth and controlled, lifting action that resists slipping once engaged. The base of each lever is mounted to the harp arm by two screws, should any adjustment be necessary. The bridge pins for the Chelby levers have also been improved; they can be adjusted, in or out, by simple turning with a hex wrench.19 DuPont hard nylon strings that range from F below Middle C to High C, and it has 19 sharpening levers. It is approximately 30" high. It has an engraved and inlaid sheesham frame with a high quality Finnish birch ply soundboard for exceptional sound and strength. Polished Brass Pipe"Stubby" Guitar Slide (1.5 inch)
['This is a beautiful polished brass "stubby" guitar slide, perfect for grinding out some gritty old blues on your slide guitar, cigar box guitar, lap steel or whatever you like to play with a slide. The slide is 1 1/2 inches in length (plus or minus 1/16 inch), and the inside diameter is approximately 13/16" (.815"), which will fit over the first knuckle on medium-sized ring fingers, and up to the first knuckle on larger fingers. If you have a very large ring finger, these might be a bit too snug. If you wear the slide on your little finger, you can always use the piece of included moleskin (see below) to size it to fit. These slides are hand-made in the USA in our own workshop. These slides have been carefully buffed and polished to a satin or semi-gloss finish (we do not do a flawless mirror finish - it would just get scuffed by the strings anyway when playing), with a special metal polishing compound that leaves behind a protective film. However, with use and wear this natural brass will dull and tarnish - but it is easily buffed and polished back to a nice shine using fine steel wool or other brass-polishing methods. The ends of this slide have been carefully smoothed and polished as well to make sure playing with them is a comfortable experience for the user. We make each of these by hand here in the C. B. Gitty workshops in New Hampshire (USA), and more time goes into cutting, smoothing and polishing them than you might think. Sure there are cheaper slides out there, but we like to think these are just a little bit special! We include a square of self-adhesive faux moleskin with each of these slides for use in sizing the inside of the slide to your finger.']
['Polished to a Satin or Semi-gloss finish', 'Includes piece of faux moleskin to help you size it to your finger', 'Inexpensive, quality slide', 'Perfect for grinding out some gritty old blues on your slide guitar']

['Our new SensoryMoon Tornado Twister Lava Lamp is the coolest weather related gift you can give to the natural disaster lovers in your family. Simply insert the whirlpool attachment, fill the tube with water, plug in our electric tornado toy, and viola! Watch with your children in awe as a twister forms within seconds of turning the tornado lamp on, staying on for as long as you\'d like. Add bits of aluminum foil for some extra twirling fun and to teach your children how a tornado vortex forms. With a 20-color option remote and a large 14" water tube, this SensoryMoon lamp is one of the most dazzling reminders of nature\'s overwhelming power and beauty.']
['THE  GIFT FOR   LOVERS. Our pet tornado machine is both lava lamp and educational learning toy in one, making it the perfect complement to the other weather station toys and related instruments your budding metereologist might have. So whether you want to use it as a science lab teaching tool kit for the children in your classroom, or a bedside twister night light for the severe climate loving teens in your family, with SensoryMoon, you are making the right choice.', "  TO  IN A BOTTLE. Why waste time on tornado tube science projects and 2 liter water bottle connector experiments, or money on plastic cap adapter attachment packs and kits, when all you'll get is temporary learning and fun? Instead, give your little scientific explorer a never-ending water vortex maker at the side of his bed with the SensoryMoon light up tornado motion toy --- the perfect electric tornado maker for boys and girls of all ages.", '20-COLOR OPTION REMOTE FOR A  LED . Whether your stormy weather lover wants to select his favorite from the 16 solid color options for a tornado mood lamp, or one of the 4 color changing transition settings to most impress his friends --- with the SensoryMoon water tornado lamp remote, nothing is outside his control. Your kids will love watching the multi-color LED lights illuminate the swirling vortex water fountain up the toy tube!', "WATER FILLED FOR HASSLE-FREE . No need to cross your fingers hoping that tornado lamp fluid doesn't leak out during shipment, or go cloudy after repeated use. Simply add your own water and an optional dash of dish soap for a realistic extreme weather whirlpool maker at the side of your desk. Plus, with a detachable lid, now you and your child can experiment by adding small pieces of aluminum foil, beads, or related things to create some more whirling madness!", 'OUTLET PLUG IN  FOR 24-7 ENJOYMENT. SensoryMoon mini tornado simulators make the perfect large night light lamp for your son or daughter\'s bedroom. That\'s because unlike similar water vortex lamps, ours are designed to run non-stop, so you never need to worry about replacing batteries, recharging with a USB, or "letting it rest". Simply select the ideal brightness, and enjoy as your kids stare in fascination at the "live" twister every night before they drift off to sleep.']

United Scientific INPW02 Friction on an Inclined Plane
["This complete set includes an inclined plane with a pulley and protractor, a Hall's carriage, a hanging pan to hold the desired weight, two wooden boards of different sizes, and a metal plate. The set is used to demonstrate the resolution of forces on an inclined plane, uniform and accelerated motions, kinetic and potential energies, and the friction between two surfaces. The wooden inclined board is 60 CM long and 10 CM wide. It can be set at any angle between 0 degrees and 45 degrees. The two scales on the protractor allow angle measurements to be made directly or by trigonometry. Students can determine the coefficients of static and sliding friction and verify the normal and frictional components of the force exerted by the plane. The aluminum wheel and cone bearings on the Hall's carriage help minimize friction on the inclined plane. Includes activity guide."]

Schatten Mini Pre 2 Dual Channel Belt-clip Guitar/Instrument Preamp for Mic/Pickup
['The Schatten Mini Pre 2 is a compact, lightweight, two channel belt-clip preamp with dual volume controls. The Mini Pre 2 is only 1 inch thick, 2 inches wide, and just over 3 inches in length (25mm x 50mm x 80mm) and weighs just 4.5 ounces (125 grams) with a battery. Schatten has kept things simple with the Mini Pre 2. When you\'re on stage there\'s a limit to the amount of stuff that you really want to have to deal with. So they gave the Mini Pre 2 a volume control for each channel, and that\'s it. This preamp features clean, crisp sound amplification and an even, flat response. Runs from a standard 9 volt battery (not included). The Schatten Mini Pre 2 is tough enough to take years of stage abuse. The Mini Pre 2 is built into a rugged ABS box that is more than tough enough to stand on. The Mini Pre 2 comes complete with a sturdy belt clip that installs on the preamp in a minute, so you may use to clip the preamp to your belt or strap, or hang it from your mic stand or music stand. The Mini Pre 2 has a stereo 1/4" TRS input jack, and a standard 1/4" mono output jack. If a 1/4" mono cord is plugged into the input, then only Channel One will operate. Channel One will preamp a pickup, and Channel Two will preamp and supply power to a condenser mic. Channel 2 can also be configured for a second pickup instead of a mic, by simply repositioning a jumper on the circuit board. Trim pots on the circuit board allow setting preamp input gains from 0 dB to 20 dB for each channel independently. Specifications Input: Stereo TRS 1/4" Output: Mono 1/4" Input Impedance: Each channel up to 10MOhm Output Impedance: Less than 3.5kOhm Battery Life: 9 volt alkaline, about 1300 hours']
['Two Channel Belt-clip Preamp with Dual Volume Controls', 'For One Pickup and Condenser Microphone, or Two Pickups', 'Channel 2 Supplies Power to Condenser Microphones', 'Runs on a Standard 9V Battery (not included)', 'Made in Canada; Two Year Warranty']

Hasbro Gaming Clue: Wizarding World Harry Potter Edition Mystery Board Game for 3-5 Players, Kids Ages 8 and Up (Amazon Exclusive)
["In this Harry Potter Edition of the Clue game, a student has vanished from the Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry. Who can solve the mysterious disappearance? Kids play as Harry, Ron, Hermione, Ginny, Luna, or Neville to discover who did it, what spell or item was used, and where the attack happened. Harry Potter fans will recognize the Owlery, Trophy Room, and other Wizarding World places on the Hogwarts gameboard. Rolling a house crest on the Hogwarts die lets the player move a wheel on the board one notch. It'll reveal secret passages, changing staircases, doors that may or may not be available to use, or the Dark Mark may appear. Go from location to location in Hogwarts and narrow down possibilities as other players show their cards. ['With this Toy Story balloon bouquet you will receive: (1) 34" Giant Blue Number 5 Foil Balloon, (2) 17" Coco Foil Balloons, (2) 19" Star Shape Foil Balloons 1- Red and 1- Lime Green, (2) 18" Black Jubilee Foil Balloons and (1) 29" Sombrero Skull Foil Balloon. Foil balloons can last multiple days if filled and stored properly. Balloons used outdoors will have a much less float time due to the elements. Foil balloons require a low pressure regulated foil inflator to inflate them. These regulators have an auto shut off pressure valve and will not over inflate them. Disposable Helium Tanks with a latex inflator Will Not properly inflate foils. Balloons can usually be properly filled at your local party supply store, florist and even some larger grocery chains will offer helium. For larger balloons or larger quantities of balloons, it may be more cost effective to rent a helium tank from a party rental company or local welding supplier. Suitable for children age 3 and over. Waldorf dolls are as individual as the children who play with them, and are designed to invite children to use their imaginations when they play. Kathe Kruse is the exclusive licensed manufacturer of textile waldorf toys, made according to the philosophy of Rudolf Steiner. For 100 years, Kathe Kruse has lovingly created dolls and toys with lasting play value. We are committed to making age-appropriate toys that encourage creativity, foster learning at one's own pace, and promote cooperative play. All Kathe Kruse products are made with hand-crafted details. Fabrication of all Kathe Kruse products takes place in Germany and Latvia, at facilities owned and managed by our company. Arno French Carbur 2 Double Sided Carbide Cabinet Scraper Burnisher 115508
['Burnishers create the tiny hook or burr on cabinet scrapers and scraper plane irons. To do this well, a burnisher needs to be extremely smooth and very hard. Some newer cabinet scrapers are made from harder steel, requiring a harder burnisher. The Arno burnisher carries two super hard and polished solid carbide inserts. Polished carbide is one of the hardest materials available (almost as hard a diamonds!) and is the ideal burnishing material. One edge is cylindrical for general use. The other is triangular with a small radius recommended for sharpening super hard scrapers, curved edges or when a larger hook is desired. These carbide inserts are housed in a forged aluminum handle with an anodized protective finish. The inserts are slightly tilted to lift the handle above the tool being sharpened. It has an integrated twin finger guard to keep sharp edges away from the hand. Works well with both right and left handers. Comes with a suede leather pouch and detailed instructions. The Arno burnisher will turn a super-quick and refined hook on every shape and thickness scraper, every time.']

["This innovative vertical holder with interchangeable game boards and magnetic game pieces allows you to play three fun, action-packed games. The games are played in teams, playing one at a time. One teammate must move the guide magnet on the backside of the game board, while the other teammate sees the game magnet move on the front of the board. This teammate must communicate with the teammate controlling the magnet and tell him or her how to move the magnet to complete the game challenge without the magnet falling off or going to the wrong spot. In the racing game, the object is speed: Which team can complete the course the fastest? But make sure you don't crash! In the golf game, the object is precision: How many strokes does the team need to take to reach the hole? But be careful, there are traps everywhere! In the treasure hunt game, players must collect as many gems as possible in a given time. Who can amass the most valuable treasure? Its 4 wheels drive gave it some versatility but the limited fuel capacity and poor off-road performance reduced its range and effectiveness in harsh environments like North Africa and Russia. It mounted a 20mm gun alongside an MG 34 machine gun and the open turret enabled the main gun to be also used as in anti-aircraft role. Even if this vehicle was eventually superceded by the Sdkfz 250, it could still be seen in operation till the end of the conflict. Contents: 1 resin Sd. Mrs Brown's Boys Adults Board Game
["Mrs Brown's Boys The Ultimate Party Game is a must for any fan of the award-winning hit comedy TV series. The comical board game will have players drawing, acting, talking non-stop and trying to guess 'What am I' before Mrs Brown speaks in order to progress around the board to get from the start to Party Night! Mrs Brown's Boys first appeared on our screens in 2011 and now fans of the hit series can continue the rip-roaring fun with Mrs Brown's Boys - The Ultimate Party Game. This cracking board game can be played by up to four players. Each player moves around the board by throwing the die and undertaking the challenges on the square on which they land, of which there are four categories; Draw, Act, Talk or 'What am I'. The player then takes a card from the Performing Cards pile and draws, acts or talks about the word on that card. The aim is for the other players to guess correctly before the random timer, which lasts between 20 - 45 seconds, goes off and Mrs Brown speaks! If the player lands on 'What am I' square then a card from the 'What am I' pile is put on the head of the player and with other players answering only yes or no they have to guess what they are before Mrs Brown speaks. If the tasks are completed before Mrs Brown speaks, the player can throw the die again and move around the board. If they fail then a 'Giggle' from Mrs Brown allows the player to stay put, 'That's nice' or 'Would you like a cup of tea love' means the player can progress one square but any other comments from Mrs Brown results in retreating two squares! This hilarious game is perfect for after dinner entertaining or just for playing with friends and fans of the show. It is certainly guaranteed to have you laughing all the way to 'Party Night'!"]

Lanikai, 4-String Ukulele, Chrome (SPSTC)
["Introducing the Lanikai SPST-C Concert Ukulele, a masterpiece of craftsmanship and musicality. This beautifully crafted ukulele features a solid spruce top and morado back and sides, delivering a full and classic concert uke tone that will enchant both players and listeners alike. The SPST-C is designed with your comfort in mind. Its wider nut and comfortable neck provide a pleasurable playing experience for musicians of all hand sizes. Whether you're strumming chords or playing lead, the rosewood fingerboard offers exceptional responsiveness, allowing your fingers to glide effortlessly and bring your music to life. But it's not just about the sound and playability. The SPST-C is a visual delight as well. The single-ply ABS binding provides a beautiful contrast to the spruce and morado body, creating an instrument that is as stunning to look at as it is to play. And when it comes to staying in tune, the Grover open-back tuning machines have got you covered. They offer solid support, ensuring that your ukulele stays perfectly tuned, whether you're practicing at home or performing on stage. Unlock your musical potential with the Lanikai SPST-C Concert Ukulele. Whether you're playing in the comfort of your living room or enjoying warm nights on the beach around a fire with friends, this ukulele is your perfect companion. Immerse yourself in its warm and mellow sound, let your creativity soar, and create magical moments of music that will be cherished forever. Experience the quality and artistry that Lanikai is known for.
